title: A face in eva 2xx
wikitext:
[]: A face in eva 2.xx Post by Ashes to Ashley » Sat Dec 03, 2011 4:22 am Im not sure if someone has already noticed this, but I was watching the scene when Asuka is in the plug of unit 3, I went through the scene frame by frame. when the camera is heading towards the blue stuff you look closley you can see a face appear. the face had really big black eyes and a creepy smile. It sorta reminded me of that scene in eva 1.xx when the Rei ghost image shot up at the camera. But then I though it also kind of looked like Asuka when she was younger. whatever though, its immpossible to tell.
